fields.description:
## Context
Document the operation-certificate model and its security contract as a named ADR artifact
`docs/adr/NNNN-opcert-asymmetric.md` (pick the next free ADR number), cross-referencing ADR 0046
(security posture; L2 no-transparency-log and L4 single-environment/no-threshold are op-cert-scoped).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `docs/adr/NNNN-opcert-asymmetric.md` exists and is non-empty, covering: the
      environment-attribution model, low/high-security postures, the authoritative-state-fetch
      integrity requirement, the out-of-band trust root (`.rebar/trusted_environments.yaml`),
      merge-gate enforcement, and HMAC removal + migration.
- [ ] The ADR cross-references ADR 0046 and contains the strings `rebar.opcert.v1`,
      `trusted_environments.yaml`, and `ADR 0046`; a test asserts the file exists, is non-empty,
      and contains those strings.
